What tone of voice should be used for th.description: Choose the tone of voice for the generated content. 'Default Riyadh Air Tone of Voice' is formal, confident, and on-brand for corporate or operational messaging. 'Marketing/Sales Focused Tone of Voice' is persuasive and conversion-oriented, used for campaigns, promotions, and offers. 'Premium / High-Tier Loyalty Tone of Voice' is elevated, exclusive, and service-focused, used when speaking to elite / high-tier members. 'General Member Loyalty Tone of Voice' is warm, friendly, and relationship-building, used for communication with the broader loyalty base.
